name: Low-Cal Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly combine all ingredients.
2. Shape into round loaf.
3. Place accessory meat rack in crockpot.
4. Place meat loaf on rack.
5. Cover and cook on High for 4 to 6 hours.
6. Each serving contains 106 calories.
7. Recipe may be doubled for larger crockpots.
